meaning: n.克鲁(在新奥尔良狂欢节最后一天主持庆祝活动的民间组织)
examples: Each "krewe" (pronounced "crew") builds a parade float that reflects one of these periods. The "krewes" also appear in period costume at a number of gala events during the festival.
Mr Quinlan says his new krewe will keep revellers on the streets, spending money until dark.
Carnival parades, the "Krewe", liven up the entire month leading up to Mardi Gras, or Fat Tuesday.
At times, Krewe of America boosters can sound as elitist as the old-timers.
